channel.title: Mcp on Bill's Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Mcp on Bill's Blog

item.title: Syncing Claude Code Across Devices with a Custom MCP Hub over Tailscale
item.description: Linking two independent Claude Code agents — a home-lab VM and a roaming laptop — through a custom MCP server over a Tailscale mesh, so the laptop can push notes to a central hub from any network without opening a single inbound port.
